svg.text: ARTIST 5 : EIGHT SOLIDS ON A SHELF
column / leaning pear / block / mushroom / comb / diamond / orb+fringe / chevron. Judge the bottom two rows first.
SIZE LADDER : 18 / 32 / 44 / 64 px tall, then frame 2 at 64 (the game draws at 32; the dock draws at 18)
4x INSPECTION : 80 x 128, editing only. Nothing here was approved from this row.
MATRIX : 8 species x 4 player colors x 3 backgrounds, all at 32 tall (true game size)
The hard case is the green column on terrain. The white halo carries it there; the ink rim carries it on the panels.
18 px DOCK BADGE : the head crop symbols, the only thing the dock ever draws
head crops at true dock size, four player colors
THE GATE : all eight in pure silhouette. Frame 1 (left block) then frame 2 (right block), at 64, 32, 18.
column / pear / block / mushroom / comb / diamond / orb+fringe / chevron. No two blots share a shape.
18 px silhouettes, frame 1 (left) and frame 2 (right). This row is the gate; if a species is unreadable here it is not finished.
mechtron vs leggite, the collision: a solid 108 wide slab against a 56 wide tube wearing eight spikes. A brick and a comb.
